_README: OPT-IN hardening overrides — NOT a full config and NOT the default. These keys REPLACE the matching keys inside a single agent's block in openclaw.json (agents.list[].tools and agents.list[].skills). The shipped default is intentionally permissive (built for a single-user local machine); apply these per agent to scope an agent down for a shared or less-trusted host. Every value here already appears as a valid value in config/openclaw.json.template. Full rationale + a per-agent before/after: docs/hardening.md.
